# Red Maple Movement

> Small-group mat Pilates studio in Campbellville, Ontario, Canada, serving the wider Halton Region — Milton, Halton Hills (Georgetown & Acton), Oakville, and Burlington. Run by certified instructor Amanda.

## About

- **Name:** Red Maple Movement (also: Red Maple Movement Pilates)
- **Instructor:** Amanda
- **Specialty:** Small-group mat Pilates (no reformer machines)
- **Philosophy:** Mindful, intentional movement for all levels, from complete beginners to experienced practitioners
- **Tagline:** Move with Intention. Transform with Strength.

## Location & contact

- **Address:** 43 Main Street South, Suite 2B, Campbellville, ON L0P 1B0, Canada (inside Glow by Nelly)
- **Email:** amanda@redmaplemovement.ca
- **Website:** https://redmaplemovement.ca

## Pricing (CAD)

- **Drop-in class:** $25
- **4-class bundle:** $85 (works out to $21.25 per class)
- **Memberships:** None — pay per class or per bundle
- **Payment method:** Interac e-Transfer

## How booking works

1. Visit the Schedule page to view upcoming classes with real-time availability
2. Select classes and check out
3. Create an account or sign in
4. Sign the digital participant waiver (first-time only)
5. Send payment via Interac e-Transfer to amanda@redmaplemovement.ca
6. Receive a confirmation email once payment is received
7. Reminder emails go out before each booked class

## Key pages

- [Home](https://redmaplemovement.ca/): brand overview, FAQ, quick-book CTA
- [About Amanda](https://redmaplemovement.ca/about.html): instructor bio, credentials, teaching philosophy
- [Schedule & Booking](https://redmaplemovement.ca/schedule.html): upcoming classes, real-time availability, booking flow
- [Pricing](https://redmaplemovement.ca/pricing.html): drop-in and bundle pricing, what each class includes
- [Participant Waiver](https://redmaplemovement.ca/waiver.html): liability waiver form for new clients
- [Cancellation Policy](https://redmaplemovement.ca/cancellation-policy.html): refund and cancellation terms

## What to bring to your first class

Comfortable clothing you can move in, and a water bottle. Mats and small props are provided at the studio. Arrive 5–10 minutes early and complete the participant waiver in advance via the Forms page.
